overall_reasoning: Anuj Wankhede is an outstanding candidate for the Software Engineer (AI/ML Focus) role. The resume demonstrates a perfect alignment with all essential and flexible requirements, showcasing strong foundational knowledge, practical project experience in both AI/ML and full-stack development, and proficiency in a wide array of relevant technologies.
